tasks.label: Git commit and push package.json
tasks.command: cd c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt\ Lvl\ Technology\ Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2 && git add package.json && git commit -m "fix: npm install in build script for Render" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Commit and push package.json
tasks.command: Set-Location "c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2"; git add package.json; git commit -m "fix: npm install in build script for Render"; git push origin main

tasks.label: Push package.json changes
tasks.command: cd "c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2"; git status; git add package.json; git commit -m fix_npm_install_in_build_for_Render; git push origin main

tasks.label: Check git status and stage changes
tasks.command: pushd "c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2"; git status; git add .; git status

tasks.label: Git diff package.json
tasks.command: $dir = 'c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2'; cd $dir; git diff package.json; echo 'END_DIFF'

tasks.label: Check last commit content
tasks.command: $dir = 'c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2'; cd $dir; git log --oneline -5; echo '---'; git show HEAD:package.json | grep -A2 '"build"'

tasks.label: View build script in HEAD
tasks.command: $dir = 'c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2'; cd $dir; git show HEAD:package.json | Select-String -Pattern 'build' -Context 0,1

tasks.label: Check git status
tasks.command: $dir = 'c:\Users\User\Desktop\Nxt Lvl Technology Solutions\nxt-lvl-api2'; cd $dir; git status
